data.content: Plan complete for per-step output targets. Three existing children confirmed in order c8f4 → 0d93 → 9727. Key decisions: canonical ArtifactTarget enum with 7 variants, strict unknown rejection, prompt rendering rewired to consume StepMetadata.output instead of profile.outputs directly. c8f4 is ready_for_plan_review (plan looks sound), 0d93 needs plan revision per binding design decisions, 9727 awaits c8f4/0d93 finalization. ~300-400 lines total across all children. No new child knots needed.
